title: Nothing Happened on Thriller Bark

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're not going to sing anymore!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let's do one more!! One more!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I thought of this song countless times...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: All alone on my huge ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: EHHHHH!!!? So that really does open!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There wasn't a single easy day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Honestly, I even lost sight of hope.
